chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Missing Person

text: هَذَا خَبَرٌ آخَرُ : "إِنْ لَمْ تَجِدْ لَهُ وَارِثاً وَ عَرَفَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ مِنْكَ اَلْجَهْدَ فَتَصَدَّقْ بِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5711 - It has also been narrated in another report:
"If you do not find an heir for him, and Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, knows that you have made every effort, then give it in charity on his behalf."
